description_long: This bungalow features a prominent hip roof with dark brown tiling and a central chimney, giving it a classic and sturdy appearance. The front facade is defined by a covered porch with wooden railings and steps, supported by stone pillars, providing a welcoming entryway. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, contrasting with the darker roof and wooden elements. Large rectangular windows are present on the sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The structure sits on a paved stone foundation with a small strip of grass along the sides, suggesting a landscaped urban setting. The overall design is compact, single-story, and emphasizes both functionality and aesthetic appeal.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark hip roof, covered front porch, stone pillars, and large side windows, set on a paved foundation with landscaped edges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, wooden railings, central steps, and stone pillars beneath the hip roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a large rectangular window, the hip roof, and the paved and grassy foundation.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wall with no windows or doors, and the full expanse of the hip roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single window, partial view of the porch, and the paved and grassy perimeter.
